figures.caption: Table 2. One-shot transfer to unseen interventions. We report Top-1 and Top-5 accuracy (%) for transfer to unseen genetic perturbations (CPG-Pilot, RxRx3) and unseen compounds (CPG-12). Best results highlighted are in bold, and second-best results are underlined

Figure 2. Framework overview. Our approach uses a chemistry-aware codebook and transcriptome-conditioned teacher to guide image student learning through distillation. Only images are required at test time.
